'''dapongo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:scaldhead|scaldhead]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-p-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:scaldhead|scaldhead]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dapongo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæpengeth|dæpengeth]] || [[word:dæpengej|dæpengej]] || [[word:dæpengesh|dæpengesh]] || [[word:dæpenge|dæpenge]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dapopongoth|dapopongoth]] || [[word:dapopongoj|dapopongoj]] || [[word:dapopongosh|dapopongosh]] || [[word:dapopongo|dapopongo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dapongoth|dapongoth]] || [[word:dapongoj|dapongoj]] || [[word:dapongosh|dapongosh]] || [[word:dapongo|dapongo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dapofngoth|dapofngoth]] || [[word:dapofngoj|dapofngoj]] || [[word:dapofngosh|dapofngosh]] || [[word:dapofngof|dapofngof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dapongotho|dapongotho]] || [[word:dapongojo|dapongojo]] || [[word:dapongosho|dapongosho]] || [[word:dapongoko|dapongoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dapongoth|dapongoth]] || [[word:dapongoj|dapongoj]] || [[word:dapongosh|dapongosh]] || [[word:dapongo|dapongo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dapongothol|dapongothol]] || [[word:dapongojol|dapongojol]] || [[word:dapongoshol|dapongoshol]] || [[word:dapongokol|dapongokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dapongothotho|dapongothotho]] || [[word:dapongojojo|dapongojojo]] || [[word:dapongoshosho|dapongoshosho]] || [[word:dapongoko|dapongoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dapongothon|dapongothon]] || [[word:dapongojon|dapongojon]] || [[word:dapongoshon|dapongoshon]] || [[word:dapongokon|dapongokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dapongothoro|dapongothoro]] || [[word:dapongojoro|dapongojoro]] || [[word:dapongoshoro|dapongoshoro]] || [[word:dapongokoro|dapongokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
